# robots.txt - VogueX Social Media Platform
# This file tells search engine crawlers which pages to index

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://voguex.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

# Allow all major search engines full access
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

# Crawl delay (optional - prevents overwhelming server)
Crawl-delay: 1
